records.ety: [LL. bestiarium, fr. L. bestiarius pert. to beasts, fr. bestia beast: cf. F. bestiaire.]

defs: A treatise on beasts; esp., one of the moralizing or allegorical beast tales written in the Middle Ages.
quotes: A bestiary . . . in itself one of the numerous mediæval renderings of the fantastic mystical Zoology.
